svg.text: ① Mastery by demonstration — we certify proven skill, not attendance.
② Practical & grounded — we teach what we actually build and ship on Claude.
③ Personalized — an AI tutor + role-based paths meet each learner where they are.
④ Verifiable — credentials are portable, tamper-evident, and employer-trusted.
⑤ Claude-native — model tiering + curriculum-as-configuration; the same content everywhere.
⑥ Drives the flywheel — enables adoption of every product & solution; pairs with people1; powers edu1.
